Title: AID4SME Open Call #2
MatchedKeywords: ai, cascade funding, data, f6s, grant, green deal, horizon europe, serbia potential, sme, startup
Summary: Horizon Europe cascade funding call for SMEs and startups developing AI and data-driven solutions for industrial resource optimisation and Green Deal challenges. Offers up to EUR 200,000 per project, equity-free, for up to 12 projects. Official FAQ states eligible Horizon Europe associated countries can apply; Serbian SMEs should verify against the latest Horizon Europe associated-country list and the applicant guidelines.

Supports technology providers and wineries through testing, adaptation and validation of low-input, environmentally friendly and digitally enabled innovations. Potentially relevant to Serbian wineries/tech providers; eligibility should be checked in the applicants guide before applying.

Open to SMEs, academics, public sector, non-profits, communities and individuals. Project proposals are expected in the EUR 5,000 to EUR 50,000 range, with open-source/open-access outcomes.

Title: NGI Fediversity 12th Open Call
MatchedKeywords: cascade funding, cloud, fediverse, foss, grant, horizon europe, ngi, open source, sme
Summary: Horizon Europe / NGI cascade funding for free and open source projects that contribute to service portability, self-hosted/cloud services, Fediverse infrastructure and the future hosting stack. Open to SMEs, academics, public sector, non-profits and individuals. Project proposals are expected in the EUR 5,000 to EUR 50,000 range.

Title: EUDOROS - Cybersecurity open call
MatchedKeywords: 28digital, cybersecurity, eudoros, eu-funded, grant, malta, serbia potential, sme, startup
Summary: EU-funded opportunity listed by 28Digital for cybersecurity service providers and tool creators aiming to push mature products to market or increase early-stage market share. Listed funding range is EUR 20,000 to EUR 200,000, with application open until 7 August 2026. The official EUDOROS site was temporarily unavailable during this pass, so verify the applicant guide before applying.

Title: FS4Africa Open Call 2
MatchedKeywords: agrifood, cascade funding, fstp, innovation hub, mentoring, sme potential, startups
Summary: EU-funded FSTP call supporting five innovation-hub projects to train, mentor and accelerate innovative food business concepts linked to African or European food entrepreneurs and startups. Title: EIC Accelerator 2026
MatchedKeywords: call, deadline, funding, grant, horizon europe, open, scale-up, sme, startup
Summary: Open EIC call for commercialisation and scale-up. Relevant for innovative SMEs and startups from Horizon Europe eligible countries, with multiple 2026 cut-off dates. Next future cut-offs after 8 July 2026: 2 September 2026 and 4 November 2026.

Title: EIC STEP Scale Up
MatchedKeywords: call, deadline, funding, investment, open, scale-up, sme, startup
Summary: Open EIC STEP Scale Up call for equity investments to catalyse larger investment rounds of EUR 50 million or above. Relevant to deep-tech scale-ups and SMEs preparing large funding rounds. Future 2026 cut-offs: 9 September 2026 and 25 November 2026.

Title: Eurostars Call 11 for Slovenia-based SMEs
MatchedKeywords: eu co-funded, eurostars, eureka, international r&d, slovenia, sme, consortium, malta potential, serbia potential
Summary: Eurostars is an EU co-funded international R&D programme for innovative SME-led consortia. Slovenia is a Eureka member route, so a Slovenian SME can be used as lead or partner where national funding rules are met. Call 11 closes on 10 September 2026 at 14:00 CEST. Good route for a Slovenia-Malta-Serbia or Slovenia-EU R&D consortium.

Title: Eurostars Call 11 for Malta-based SMEs
MatchedKeywords: eu co-funded, eurostars, eureka, horizon europe, international r&d, malta, sme, serbia potential
Summary: Eurostars is an EU co-funded international R&D programme for innovative SME-led consortia. Malta Enterprise confirms that Malta-based participants may apply and that Eurostars Call 11 opens on 9 July 2026 and closes on 10 September 2026 at 14:00 CEST. Good route for a Maltese SME partnering internationally, including potentially with Serbian partners where programme rules and national funding permit.

Title: EIC Transition 2026
MatchedKeywords: call, deadline, grant, horizon europe, sme, startup, transition
Summary: EIC Transition supports technology and business maturation and validation, with grants up to EUR 2.5 million. SMEs, startups, spin-offs, universities and research organisations can apply as single applicants or in small consortia, subject to eligible prior project results.

Title: RIVCircular Cascade Funding Open Call
MatchedKeywords: cascade funding, circular economy, consortium, digital solutions, eu-funded, grant, partner route, sme
Summary: Cascade funding call supporting circular-economy innovation in five topics: construction and demolition waste, circular energy integration, EV battery recycling and reuse, circular textiles, and digital solutions for circular economy. Funding can reach up to EUR 600,000. The call requires a consortium and focuses on seven participating regions, so Serbian/Maltese companies should use this mainly through an eligible regional partner.

Title: Malta Enterprise - Research & Development
MatchedKeywords: malta, malta enterprise, r&d, research and development, eurostars, eureka, grant, tax credit, sme
Summary: Support for industry undertaking industrial research and experimental development activities. Aid can be cash grants and tax credits, calculated by project type and company size. Collaborative R&D and EUREKA/Eurostars endorsed projects may also be considered under this incentive for Malta-based companies.

Title: Malta Enterprise - Start-up Finance
MatchedKeywords: malta, malta enterprise, sme, startup, software development, life sciences, repayable advance
Summary: Malta-based small start-up undertaking support through repayable advance for viable businesses in manufacturing, software development, industrial services, health, biotechnology, pharmaceuticals, life sciences and other innovative technology-enabled activities. Useful for a Maltese company that is developing or expanding a new operation in Malta.

Title: EIC Pathfinder Challenges 2026
MatchedKeywords: call, deadline, deep tech, grant, horizon europe, sme
Summary: EIC Pathfinder Challenges support breakthrough deep-tech projects with grants and business acceleration support. SMEs may participate where the consortium and eligibility rules are met. The 2026 Challenges deadline is 28 October 2026.

Title: Malta Enterprise - Innovate: Innovation Aid for SMEs
MatchedKeywords: grant, innovation, malta, malta enterprise, research collaboration, sme
Summary: Innovation aid for SMEs with scope for growth. Supports product, process and organisational innovation through collaboration with research and knowledge-dissemination organisations, highly qualified personnel, innovation advisory services and support services. Grant covers up to 50% of costs, capped at EUR 250,000.

Title: Malta Enterprise - Business Start
MatchedKeywords: business start, grant, malta, malta enterprise, seed funding, sme, startup
Summary: Early seed funding for small start-ups with an economically feasible business concept. Eligible activities include manufacturing, software development, industrial services, health, biotechnology, pharmaceuticals, life sciences and other innovative technology-enabled activities. Grant of up to EUR 10,000.

Title: Malta Enterprise - Smart & Sustainable Investment Grant
SourceLevel: Malta national / green and digital investment
MatchedKeywords: cash grant, digitisation, energy efficiency, green, malta, malta enterprise, sme, sustainable investment
Summary: Cash grant for Malta-based businesses investing at least EUR 10,000 in sustainability, improved environmental performance or digitisation leading to growth potential. Eligible areas include waste minimisation, sustainable materials, energy efficiency, water efficiency and sustainable digitisation. Grant covers 50% of eligible expenditure up to EUR 100,000 per project.

Title: OFELIA Open Call
MatchedKeywords: cascade funding, functional foods, medicinal aromatic plants, sme, upcoming
Summary: Upcoming EU-funded FSTP call for SMEs in functional foods and medicinal/aromatic plants value chains, with a focus on less developed regions across Europe. The call will support small, regionally based consortia and fund 16 sub-projects. Potentially relevant for Serbian SMEs in food, functional ingredients and medicinal/aromatic plants, subject to eligibility confirmation.

Title: Women TechEU 2 EIC - Eligibility Strand
MatchedKeywords: deep tech, eic, eu grant, malta, non-dilutive, serbia, sme, startup, women-led
Summary: EU-funded programme for women-led early-stage deep-tech startups from Europe. Selected startups receive EUR 75,000 in non-dilutive funding plus mentoring, coaching and training. Eligible countries explicitly include Malta and Serbia. The first step is the Eligibility Strand, with weekly cut-offs every Tuesday at 17:00 CE(S)T until the final cut-off on 13 July 2027.

Title: EIC Pre-Accelerator 2027
MatchedKeywords: associated countries, call, deep tech, grant, opening, serbia, sme, startup, widening countries
Summary: Upcoming EIC Pre-Accelerator call for early-stage deep-tech SMEs and small mid-caps from widening countries. Serbia is listed among eligible associated countries. The call opens on 5 May 2027 and deadline is 18 November 2027.

Title: Malta Enterprise - Accelerate 2024
MatchedKeywords: accelerator, eea, grant, malta, malta enterprise, sme, startup
Summary: Support for undertakings in their first 7 years to finance participation in accelerator programmes recognised by Malta Enterprise. Eligible businesses must be registered in the EEA and engaged or planning to engage in areas such as manufacturing, software development, industrial services, life sciences, engineering design, space technologies or other approved technology-enabled activities. Grant up to EUR 100,000.

Title: Malta Enterprise - Micro Invest 2026-2030
MatchedKeywords: malta, micro invest, sme, tax credit, upcoming
Summary: Tax-credit scheme for small undertakings in Malta employing at least one and not more than 50 employees. Supports wage costs and new tangible assets, with aid intensity up to 65%, or up to 85% for Gozo. Applications for this measure may be submitted from 1 January 2027, up to one application per year.

Title: USAID Development Innovation Ventures (DIV)
MatchedKeywords: usaid, usa, state grant, development innovation ventures, innovation, grant, sme potential, rolling
Summary: Open innovation grant route for evidence-based solutions with development impact. Relevant where the Serbian or Maltese company has a product that can show impact in eligible developing-country contexts. DIV is not Serbia-specific and is usually assessed by stage, evidence and cost-effectiveness, so treat as a high-potential but competitive route.

Title: Slovene Enterprise Fund public calls and tenders
SourceLevel: Slovenia national / SME grants and finance
MatchedKeywords: slovenia, slovene enterprise fund, sps, sme, startup, grants, guarantees, vouchers, monitoring
Summary: Primary Slovenia SME support route for grants, seed/startup incentives, guarantees, microloans and development incentives. Best used as a monitoring source for a Slovenian company because calls are programme-specific and periodic. Particularly relevant for startup incentives, vouchers, guarantees, digitalisation and development-oriented SME finance.

Title: UNITE digital health startup programme
MatchedKeywords: 28digital, digital health, eu-backed, grant, malta, serbia potential, startup, unite, upcoming
Summary: Upcoming EU-backed programme listed by 28Digital for digital health startups addressing ageing populations and demographic challenges. Listed grant range is EUR 200,000 to EUR 1,000,000, with application marked as coming up. Add to watchlist for Malta/Serbia digital health startups and check the official UNITE page when the call opens.

Title: SID Bank Slovenia SME, export, innovation and green finance

Summary: Slovenian promotional development and export bank route. This is finance/insurance rather than a classic grant, but useful for a Slovenian company preparing co-financing or export/investment projects.

Title: SPIRIT Slovenia public tenders for companies

Summary: Monitoring route for Slovenian public tenders supporting entrepreneurship, internationalisation, investment promotion, exports, innovation and competitiveness. Summary: Swiss national funding route for Swiss partners in international SME-led R&D projects under Eurostars/Eureka. Summary: Monitoring route for Slovenian EU-funded public calls under cohesion, recovery, digital, green and competitiveness programmes. MatchedKeywords: sweden, vinnova, eurostars, eureka, international r&d, sme, consortium
Summary: Swedish state innovation funding route for Swedish partners in international R&D and innovation consortia. Relevant when a Swedish SME or research partner can join the Malta or Serbia company in Eurostars/Eureka-style projects. Monitor Vinnova calls and Eurostars cut-offs.

Title: Sida challenge-fund and private-sector development routes

Relevant for projects with strong development, sustainability or inclusion impact.

Title: USAID and U.S. Government Serbia / Western Balkans grant monitoring

Summary: Dutch voucher/subsidy route for Dutch SMEs that want to start or expand international business. Useful only if a Dutch company or Dutch partner is part of the structure; not directly for a Serbian or Maltese company without a Dutch route.

Title: Swedish Institute funding and grant monitoring

Summary: Monitoring route for Swedish Institute calls. These are often aimed at organisations, networks and cooperation projects rather than direct SME grants, but can be relevant if the company participates with universities, NGOs, municipalities or ecosystem partners.
